title: Emartbuy Set of 2 Red Square Gift Boxes with Gold Rope Handle & Satin Ribbon – Luxury Rigid Cardboard Boxes for Festive, Wedding & Corporate Gifting | 8 x 8 x 8 cm & 10 x10 x 10 cm
features: Stylish Presentation: Each box features a sophisticated color scheme with a contrasting interior. Exquisite Detailing: Adorned with a satin decorative bow ribbon , enhancing the box's luxurious appeal.
Preassembled and Rigid: Delivered ready-to-use , crafted for durability and a premium presentation. Versatile Use: Perfect for a wide range of gift presentations , accommodating various item sizes.
Eco-Friendly Materials: Made from 1200 GSM recycled paperboard , offering both luxury and sustainability.

Recyclable: Entire packaging is recyclable , except for the decorative ribbon , supporting environmental responsibility. Nesting Design: Boxes conveniently nest into each other for easy storage and space-saving. Perfectly Sized for Small Gifts: Designed to hold small , precious items elegantly , ensuring they are presented beautifully, you can use this for smaller box
Dimensions : Box 1 - 8 cm x 8 cm x 8 cm ( 3.14 Inches x 3.14 Inches x 3.14 Inches ) Box 2 - 10 cm x 10 cm x 10 cm ( 3.93 Inches x 3.93 Inches x 3.93 Inches )
description: Product Description Treasure away your precious moments and delightful gifts with the creative cardboard boxes from Emartbuy. These boxes and gifting containers enhance the mood and complement the presents. They are artistically designed and very resourceful. These boxes keep you surprise safe and ready to be gifted to someone special. Made with Hard Cardboard The durability of these boxes are high as they can withstand any amount of frequent usage. The gift boxes are made up of hard cardboard which makes them strong and sturdy. The boxes are resistant to getting damaged with continuous usage. Beautiful Interior Design These gift boxes are beautifully designed to add charm to your gifts. They have an elegant red gift box with satin ribbon design with a Brown interior beautifully finished with a golden rope handle. The boxes are functional and extremely fashionable. High On Detailing The design on the boxes is what makes them a good choice to present it to your beloved ones. The boxes add a finishing touch to the present and make the experience of receiving and giving a gift more special. Complement's the Gift The amazing gift boxes comes in 2 different sizes, hence they make it more convenient to pack your gifts and also provide more space for the present. The colour and texture of box gives an eye catching complement to your gift. No Assembly Required The boxes do not require any assembly as they are pre-assembled. It is very versatile to use these boxes as they are built and saves your time during special occasions.

specifications_table.Occasion: Anniversary, Birthday, Christmas, Mother's Day, Wedding
